Index

A C D F G H I K L M N O P R S T 
All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

S

saver - Variable in class Frogger
 
screen - Variable in class Menu
 
setFont(Font) - Method in class Menu
Sets the font of the labels
setHighlight(int) - Method in class Menu
Sets the highlight on to a label; This does not change the index
setImage(ImageIcon) - Method in class Obstacle
Sets the image of the obstacle
setObstacleColor(Color) - Method in class Lane
Sets the obstacles to a new color
setObstacleImage(ImageIcon) - Method in class Lane
Sets the obstacles to a new image
setObstacleStart(int) - Method in class Lane
Sets the starting point for the obstacles
setObstacleWidth(int) - Method in class Lane
Sets the width of the obstacles
setSize(int, int) - Method in class Obstacle
Sets the size of the obstacle and image
setSpacing(int) - Method in class Lane
Sets the spacing between multiple obstacles
setSpacing(int) - Method in class Menu
Sets the spacing between labels
setStart(int) - Method in class Menu
Sets the starting point for the first label
setup() - Method in class Frogger
Sets up the game of Frogger
spacing - Variable in class Lane
 
started - Variable in class Frogger
 
startingPoint - Variable in class Lane
